message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: My task: Add Token Position Tracking (return_positions param on encode). Only touches tiktoken/core.py. What does your feature touch?

type: PROPOSE
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: Adding transformers param to Encoding.encode() for text preprocessing before tokenization. Only touching core.py.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
your_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: Both features necessarily touch core.py (only file for encode()). Overlap accepted - I'll add return_positions param to Encoding.encode(), you add transformers param. I'll try to keep my diff additive/minimal to ease merging. Will merge your branch before final patch.txt.

type: REVISE
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
your_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: We both need to edit encode() in core.py - true overlap, can't be disjoint. Proposal: I'll add 'transformers' param as the LAST keyword-only param in encode()/encode_ordinary() signatures, applying transforms to text at the very start of the method body before any other logic. Please add 'return_positions' similarly as a separate late param, with your logic in a separate block. I'll implement now and send DONE with exact diff; then pull my branch before you edit so we layer cleanly instead of racing.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
your_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: Agreed. I'll wait for your DONE, pull your branch, then add return_positions as a separate late kwarg with its own logic block in encode()/encode_ordinary(). Will ping you when I'm done too.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
your_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: Confirmed. Starting implementation of transformers param now.

type: DONE
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: Implemented and pushed transformers param on encode() (last kwarg, applied at top of method body before allowed_special logic). Committed as 34c92db on agent2 branch. Safe for you to pull in and layer return_positions on top.

type: DONE
my_files: tiktoken/core.py
note: Implemented return_positions param on encode(), layered on top of your transformers change. Pushed as c604e21 on agent1 branch (fast-forwarded from your 34c92db). Tested both features together - work fine combined. Ran full test suite, all pass except a pre-existing unrelated hypothesis failure (test_hyp_batch_roundtrip) that exists even before my changes.
